channel.title: Debugging on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Debugging on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: DevUI Agent Inspector for Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now includes DevUI Agent Inspector in public preview. It provides a local debugging view for agent runs with a tree of model calls, tool invocations, and intermediate state, plus controls to pause, replay, and edit prompts during execution.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio — April update
item.description:
The April 2026 GitHub Copilot update for Visual Studio focuses on agentic workflows. It adds direct cloud agent sessions from the IDE, user-level support for custom agents, and a new Debugger agent for validation.

  • Source: GitHub
